entries.zh: 启用数值输入框拖动调节
修复镜头相对装饰拖动
修复镜头/视差装饰轴心显示

entries.en: Fix video background sync from checkpoints
entries.zh: 修复中途播放时视频背景延迟
持久化官方编辑器偏好设置
在编辑器内显示快捷设置浮窗

entries.en: Temporary files are written here while rendering. Leave the default unless the drive is too small.
entries.zh: 渲染时临时视频和音频会写在这里。除非磁盘空间不够，否则保持默认即可。

entries.en: Final MP4 files are saved here.
entries.zh: 最终生成的 MP4 视频会保存到这里。

entries.en: Horizontal resolution. Higher values are sharper but slower and create larger files.
entries.zh: 横向分辨率。越大越清晰，但渲染更慢、文件更大。

entries.en: Quickly choose 1080p, 2K (1440p), or 4K. Manual width and height are still available below.
entries.zh: 一键选择 1080p、2K（1440p）或 4K。下面仍然可以手动微调宽高。

entries.en: Vertical resolution. 1080 is recommended for most uploads.
entries.zh: 纵向分辨率。普通投稿推荐 1080。

entries.en: Frames per second. 60 fps is smooth and recommended.
entries.zh: 每秒画面数量。60 帧已经很流畅，推荐保持默认。

entries.en: 30 is smaller, 60 is recommended, 120 is smoother but much heavier.
entries.zh: 30 帧体积更小，60 帧推荐，120 帧更顺滑但渲染和播放压力更高。

entries.en: Advanced quality value. Lower is clearer. With bitrate limiting, it mainly controls NVENC VBR quality.
entries.zh: 高级画质参数。数值越低越清晰。启用码率限制后，它主要影响 NVENC 的 VBR 质量。

entries.en: Limits file size and peak playback load. 0 = auto recommendation. Common 60 fps values: 1080p 20, 2K 35, 4K 60.
entries.zh: 限制文件体积和播放器峰值压力。0 = 自动推荐。常见 60 帧建议：1080p 20，2K 35，4K 60。

entries.en: Current recommendation: {0} Mbps; effective target: {1} Mbps.
entries.zh: 当前推荐：{0} Mbps；实际目标：{1} Mbps。

entries.en: Custom fallback. Use values like cpu, x264:fast, or x264:ultrafast only when a preset mode is not enough.
entries.zh: 自定义兜底项。只有预设档位不够用时才填写 cpu、x264:fast、x264:ultrafast 这类值。

entries.en: Auto Balanced prefers GPU encoding, keeps H.264/yuv420p/AAC/MP4 compatibility, and falls back to x264 when needed.
entries.zh: 自动均衡会优先 GPU 编码，同时保持 H.264/yuv420p/AAC/MP4 兼容性，必要时回退 x264。

entries.en: RGBA is the stable default. BGRA is experimental and may be faster on some Direct3D systems.
entries.zh: RGBA 是稳定默认项。BGRA 是实验项，在部分 Direct3D 环境下可能更快。

entries.en: Full shows the chart while rendering. Minimal hides the preview and only keeps the progress overlay.
entries.zh: 完整预览会显示谱面画面；极简模式会隐藏预览，只保留进度遮罩。

entries.en: Advanced fallback. Positive values make audio earlier; negative values delay audio. 10 frames at 60 fps is about 167 ms.
entries.zh: 高级兜底设置。正数让音频提前，负数让音频延后。60 帧下 10 帧约等于 167 毫秒。

entries.en: Output container format. MP4 has the best compatibility. MKV supports more codecs. MOV is Apple-oriented.
entries.zh: 输出容器格式。MP4 兼容性最好。MKV 支持的编码更多。MOV 偏向苹果生态。

entries.en: WARNING: The following settings are intended for experienced users only. Incorrect values may cause rendering failures, excessively large files, unplayable output, or system instability. If you are not familiar with video encoding concepts such as CRF, bitrate, encoder presets, pixel formats, or audio codecs, please close this section and use the defaults. Proceed at your own risk.
entries.zh: 警告：以下设置仅供有经验的用户使用。错误的参数值可能导致渲染失败、文件体积过大、输出无法播放或系统不稳定。如果您不熟悉 CRF、码率、编码预设、像素格式、音频编码等概念，请关闭此区域并使用默认设置。继续操作风险自负。
打开 FFmpeg 参数参考帮助
显示专业 FFmpeg 设置
隐藏专业 FFmpeg 设置

entries.en: Enter a complete custom FFmpeg mux argument string. When filled, it replaces all auto-generated output parameters including video codec, audio codec, container flags, and map directives. The system still handles input files and audio sync offset automatically. Example: -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -c:v copy -c:a flac
entries.zh: 输入完整的自定义 FFmpeg 合成参数字符串。填写后将完全取代自动生成的输出参数（包括视频编码、音频编码、容器标记和映射指令）。系统仍会自动处理输入文件和音频同步偏移。示例：-map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -c:v copy -c:a flac
自定义 FFmpeg 合成参数

entries.en: Leave empty to use auto-generated parameters. This field is for expert troubleshooting and advanced output customization only.
entries.zh: 留空则使用自动生成参数。此字段仅供专家排查和高级输出自定义使用。

entries.en: Audio codec used in the final MP4. AAC is lossy and recommended. FLAC and ALAC are lossless.
entries.zh: 成品视频中使用的音频编码。AAC 是有损压缩，兼容性最好。FLAC 和 ALAC 是无损格式。

entries.en: Changes apply to the next render immediately. Lower CRF means higher quality and larger files.
entries.zh: 修改后下一次渲染立即生效。CRF 越低画质越高、文件越大。

entries.en: Recommended default: 1080p, 60 fps, GPU encoding when available.
entries.zh: 推荐默认：1080p、60 帧，并在可用时优先使用 GPU 硬编码。

entries.en: Advanced settings are only needed for troubleshooting or special export requirements.
entries.zh: 高级设置只适合排查问题或有特殊导出需求时使用。

entries.en: Extra seconds recorded after the final tile so ending effects and echoes are not cut off.
entries.zh: 最后一个砖块后额外录制几秒，避免结尾特效或回声被切掉。

entries.en: Controls whether Perfect/Early/Late text appears in the exported video.
entries.zh: 控制成品视频里是否显示 Perfect、Early、Late 等判定文字。

entries.en: When enabled, select at least two continuous tiles in the editor. Rendering starts at the first selected tile and stops after the last selected tile.
entries.zh: 开启后，在编辑器中框选至少两个连续砖块。渲染会从第一个选中砖块开始，并在最后一个选中砖块后停止。

entries.en: Load a custom level in the editor first.
entries.zh: 请先在编辑器加载自定义谱面。

entries.en: The loaded level has no song file.
entries.zh: 当前谱面没有音乐文件。

entries.en: Missing Tools/ffmpeg.exe in the mod folder.
Select at least two continuous tiles first.
entries.zh: 请先框选至少两个连续砖块。

entries.en: Selected range rendering is available in the editor only.
entries.zh: 选中段落渲染只能在编辑器中使用。

entries.en: Timed out while preparing the selected range.
Steam is not available. Launch the game through Steam to use cloud sync.
entries.zh: Steam 不可用。请通过 Steam 启动游戏以使用云同步。

entries.en: Upload failed. Check the log for details.
Download failed. Check the log for details.
No cloud save found. Upload your settings first.
entries.zh: 云端没有存档，请先上传设置。
